case_title: UNIFUND CCR LLC VS. JUAN A MUNOZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MUNOZ, JUAN A DOES 1 TO 15 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-29-2020

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-15-2020 CONTINUED TO JAN-26-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-26-2021 CONTINUED TO MAR-30-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200007060) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-15-2020 CONTINUED TO DEC-15-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-30-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
